cues.text: 第十九課：把重要的資料放我這兒吧
cues.tr: Lesson 19: Put the Important Documents with Me

cues.text: 場景：兩個同事，王明和小李，正在辦公室準備出差需要的資料，兩人討論如何分工和保存重要文件。
cues.tr: Scene: Two colleagues, Wang Ming and Xiao Li, are in the office preparing the necessary materials for a business trip. They discuss how to divide tasks and secure important documents.

cues.text: 小李，我們明天就要出差了，資料準備得怎麼樣了？
cues.tr: Xiao Li, we’re leaving for the business trip tomorrow. How’s the preparation coming along?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 還在整理呢。我今天才把所有的會議文件印出來，還有一些資料還沒整理好。
cues.tr: Still organizing. I just printed out all the meeting documents today, but there are still some materials I haven’t sorted yet.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 沒關係，我也才剛整理完我的部分。我們把所有的資料集中到一起吧，這樣比較方便。
cues.tr: No worries, I’ve just finished my part too. Let’s gather all the materials together; it’ll be more convenient that way.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 好主意。這樣的話，不會有遺漏的風險。我把財務報表和客戶資料放在這個文件夾裡了。
cues.tr: Great idea. That way, we can avoid any risk of missing something. I’ve already put the financial reports and client information in this folder.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那重要的合同也給我吧，我幫你一起整理。
cues.tr: Hand me the important contracts too, and I’ll help you organize them.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 好的。我習慣把合同放在右邊的抽屜裡，但這次出差還是交給你保管吧。
cues.tr: Sure. I usually keep the contracts in the right-hand drawer, but for this trip, I’ll leave them with you.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 沒問題，我會好好保管的。這已經習慣成自然了，每次出差前都會檢查好所有資料。
cues.tr: No problem, I’ll take good care of them. I’m used to this—it’s second nature now. Before every trip, I always double-check all the documents.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 嗯，王明，謝謝你這麼細心。你把會議日程表也印出來了嗎？
cues.tr: Thank you for being so meticulous, Wang Ming. Have you also printed out the meeting schedule?
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 對，已經印好了，我放在你的文件夾裡了。還有什麼資料需要準備嗎？
cues.tr: Yes, it’s already printed and placed in your folder. Is there anything else we need to prepare?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 好像還差公司簡介。我去找一下，把它放到我們的資料夾裡。
cues.tr: It seems we’re missing the company profile. I’ll go find it and add it to our folder.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 好。我覺得我們這次的準備算是充分了。
cues.tr: Alright. I think our preparation is pretty thorough this time.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 也是。這樣一來，應該不會有什麼問題。我們要互相幫助，這樣才更有把握。
cues.tr: Agreed. This way, we shouldn’t encounter any issues. We need to help each other to be more confident.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 說得對。既然我們資料都整理好了，明天就專心開會吧！
cues.tr: Absolutely. Since we’ve organized everything, let’s focus on the meeting tomorrow!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 嗯，出門前我會再檢查一遍，看有沒有落下的東西。
cues.tr: Sure. Before leaving, I’ll double-check everything to make sure nothing is left behind.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那我們把資料放在一起吧，方便攜帶。
cues.tr: Let’s keep all the materials together for easy carrying.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 好主意。我把我的資料放在你的公事包裡，這樣一路上你也可以隨時看一看。
cues.tr: Good idea. I’ll put my materials in your briefcase so you can review them anytime during the trip.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 沒問題，那我把這些文件都收好。你幫我檢查一下是不是都帶齊了？
cues.tr: No problem. I’ll store all the documents properly. Can you check if we’ve got everything?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 嗯，看起來都在了。我覺得這樣的準備方式真的很有效。
cues.tr: Looks like everything’s here. I think this preparation method is really effective.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 是啊，習慣成自然嘛，每次有重要會議，我們都得這樣準備。
cues.tr: Exactly, it’s second nature by now. Every time we have an important meeting, we prepare like this.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 對，我也覺得我們的合作很順利。希望明天的會議一切順利！
cues.tr: Right, I also think our collaboration is smooth. I hope tomorrow’s meeting goes well!
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 加油！明天我們早點出發，確保萬無一失。
cues.tr: Let’s do our best! We’ll leave early tomorrow to ensure everything goes off without a hitch.
cues.speaker: A
